headline: Moody’s Agentic Solutions Now Available in AWS Marketplace
summary: NEW YORK, April 16, 2026--Moody’s Corporation (NYSE: MCO) today announced that its Moody’s Agentic Solutions (MAS) workflows are now available in AWS Marketplace. Available now with the MAS Credit Memo workflow, and with additional credit and compliance capabilities to follow, Moody’s decision-grade intelligence is accessible directly within AWS Marketplace.

headline: How Moody’s (MCO) Story Is Shifting As Strong Results Meet Lower Valuation Assumptions
summary: Moody's latest analyst update trims the fair value estimate from US$575.53 to US$537.85, a reduction of about US$37.68 that catches the eye right away. Analysts are generally constructive on the business, but many are pairing their positive take on recent Q4 results and 2026 guidance with more cautious price targets, reflecting mixed views on risks and what investors are currently willing to pay. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets fit into the wider narrative and what to...
